name: Triple Chocolate and Vanilla Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups finely crushed cream-filled chocolate sandwich cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine crumbs and margarine. Press into 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in the sweetened condensed milk, then eggs, flour, and vanilla until smooth.
4. Divide the batter in half. Add chocolate to one half of the batter and mix well.
5. Pour into pan. Top with vanilla batter.
6. Bake for 50 minutes or until set. Cool.
7. Top with chocolate swirls. Chill. Refrigerate leftovers.
Glaze: In a small saucepan, melt chocolate and whipping cream over low heat. Cook and stir until thickened.
